errors.pageNotFoundSub: That URL doesn't exist. Let's get you back to building.
errors.fileTooLarge: File too large. Maximum size is {{maxSize}}{{unitLabel}}.
errors.importParseError: Could not read file. Check the format and try again.
errors.notExcelFormat: This file doesn't appear to be a valid Excel file (.xlsx). The content looks like plain text, not a spreadsheet. Try saving the file with a .csv extension and using 'Import from CSV' instead.
errors.notCsvFormat: This .csv file appears to be an Excel workbook (.xlsx), not a plain-text CSV. Try saving the file with a .xlsx extension and using 'Import from Excel' instead.
errors.notLatexFormat: This file doesn't appear to be a valid LaTeX file. The content should contain a \begin{tabular} or \begin{table} block.

meta.homeDescription: Build clean, structured tables with full control over headers, formatting, and export. Free table maker, no signup required. Export to PDF, Excel, CSV, or PNG.
meta.aboutDescription: Learn about {{name}}, the minimalist table builder for analytical writing. Built for writers, analysts, and researchers who need clean structured tables.
meta.blogDescription: Writing about tables, structure, and analytical thinking. Guides on Markdown tables, CSV import, Excel copy-paste, and more.
meta.contactDescription: Get in touch with the {{name}} team. Feature requests, bug reports, and feedback are always welcome.
meta.openSourceDescription: {{name}} is free and open source. The code is on GitHub — read, fork, or adapt it for your own needs. We believe tools for writing should be transparent.
meta.changelogDescription: Every release of {{name}}, documented. See what is new, fixed, and improved in each version of the free online table builder for writers and researchers.
meta.testimonialsDescription: Hear from writers, analysts, researchers, and technical thinkers who use {{name}} every day — the free online table builder with drag-to-resize, merge cells, and export.
meta.featuresDescription: Every feature you need to build clean, structured tables. Drag-to-resize, merge cells, custom headers, export to PDF and Excel.
meta.notFoundDescription: Page not found. Let us get you back to building tables.
meta.privacyDescription: {{name}} Privacy Policy. We do not require an account and we do not store your table data on any server.
meta.termsDescription: {{name}} Terms of Use — your rights, our responsibilities. Covers open source licensing, data privacy, acceptable use, and liability limitations for the free online table builder.

toast.exportError: Export failed. Try reducing the table size.
toast.importError: Could not read file. Check the format and try again.
toast.clipboardError: Could not copy to clipboard. Try again.
toast.copyData: Table data copied. Paste into Excel or Google Sheets.
toast.pasteError: Could not read clipboard. Try importing a file instead.
toast.aiWaitlist: AI features are coming soon! Reach out to share what you'd like to see.
toast.pwaUpdate: A new version is available. Reloading…

cookieConsent.message: This site uses cookies for analytics. No personal data is collected.
cookieConsent.learnMoreAria: Learn more about our privacy policy

productHunt.description: A minimalist table builder with LaTeX, PDF, and Excel export
productHunt.checkItOut: Check it out on Product Hunt
